BRANCH.COMMENT: check member challenges exists or not

SEQUENCE.NAME: LIFETIME
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if limit period type is lifetime

MAP.NAME: %challengeEligibilityRs/limit%>%noOfChallenges%
MAP.COMMENT: set limit available to true and set limit remaining

SEQUENCE.NAME: POLICYPERIOD
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if limit period type is policyperiod

MAP.COMMENT: compare challenge effectives dates to policy start and end dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether challenges are with in this policy period

MAP.COMMENT: get no of challenges in a policy period

MAP.NAME: %challengeEligibilityRs/limit%>%noOfChallenges%
MAP.COMMENT: set limit available to true and set limit reamining

SEQUENCE.NAME: MONTHLY
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if limit period type is monthly

MAP.COMMENT: compare challenge effectives dates to month start and end dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether challenges are with in this month

MAP.COMMENT: get no of challenges in a month

MAP.NAME: %challengeEligibilityRs/limit%>%noOfChallenges%
MAP.COMMENT: set limit available to true and set limit remaining

SEQUENCE.NAME: WEEKLY
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if limit period type is weekly

MAP.COMMENT: compare challenge effectives dates to week start and end dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether challenges are with in a week

MAP.COMMENT: get no of challenges in a week

MAP.NAME: %challengeEligibilityRs/limit%>%noOfChallenges%
MAP.COMMENT: set limit available to true and set limit remaining

SEQUENCE.NAME: DAILY
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if limit period type is daily

MAP.COMMENT: compare challenge effectives dates to eligibility effective date

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether challenges are with in day

MAP.COMMENT: get no of challenges in a day

MAP.NAME: %challengeEligibilityRs/limit%>%noOfChallenges%
MAP.COMMENT: set limit available to true and set limit remaining

SEQUENCE.NAME: ANNUALLY
SEQUENCE.COMMENT: if limit period type is annually

MAP.COMMENT: compare challenge effectives dates to year start and end dates

BRANCH.COMMENT: check whether challenges are with in year

MAP.COMMENT: get no of challenges in a year

MAP.NAME: %challengeEligibilityRs/limit%>%noOfChallenges%&%challengeStatus%!='ACTIVE'
MAP.COMMENT: set limit available to true and set limit remaining

MAP.NAME: %challengeEligibilityRs/limit%>'0'
MAP.COMMENT: set limit available to true and set limt remaining
